name: OSCAR Pet Foods Ltd
description: The company offers a variety of dog food options, including 16 recipes that cater to different life stages and dietary needs, such as grain-free and weight control formulas.

description: LIVIN’ WILD is dedicated to providing pets with wholesome, clean, and natural food that reflects their wild ancestry, ensuring they remain healthy and in great shape.

name: iFood
description: iFood is a prominent foodtech company in Latin America that specializes in food delivery services, connecting customers with a diverse range of restaurants.

name: Special Dog Company
description: Special Dog Company is a Brazilian manufacturer that specializes in high-quality pet food for dogs and cats of all sizes and life stages. With a commitment to sustainability, the company serves over 4 million pets across Brazil and 13 other countries.

name: Fooda

name: RobinFood
description: RobinFood, a prominent cloud restaurant company in Latin America, is dedicated to providing good and affordable food. Their commitment to sustainability and innovative dining experiences aligns with their mission to make quality food accessible to everyone in the region.

name: Foodpanda
description: foodpanda, a subsidiary of Delivery Hero, is a prominent food and grocery delivery platform operating in over 400 cities across Asia. With a commitment to convenience and quick delivery, foodpanda ensures that customers can easily access their favorite meals and groceries.

name: Food+ by Compass
description: Food+ by Compass is a service provider that emphasizes sustainable food practices and offers a diverse range of culinary experiences. Although the text does not specifically mention dog food, the company's commitment to innovative and wellness-focused options may reflect a broader dedication to quality food offerings.

name: Dot Foods
description: Dot Foods specializes in logistics and supply chain management within the food sector, offering a wide selection of name-brand meat substitutes and plant-based products, making them a valuable resource for those interested in dog food alternatives.

name: Pet Food Experts
description: Pet Food Experts is a dedicated distributor of over 150 specialty pet food brands, emphasizing their commitment to supporting independent pet retailers. Their extensive experience and innovative approach position them as key players in the pet food industry.
